rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: No. 2 - The Mystery of the Human Body
No. 3 - On the Beliefs of the Unbelievers
No. 4 - On the unseen ascension of the body
No. 5 - On the Holy Spirit, that did not descend from the son
No. 7 - The secret of the priesthood
